# mgc_container_registry_members (Data Source)

Lists all members of a Container Registry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mgc_container_registry_members" "members" {
  registry_id = mgc_container_registries.registry.id
}

output "members" {
  value = data.mgc_container_registry_members.members
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `registry_id` (String) ID of the registry whose members will be listed

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) List of members of the registry (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))

<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the membership was created
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the membership entry
- `registry_id` (String) ID of the registry
- `role` (String) Role assigned to the member
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the membership was last updated
- `user_id` (String) ID of the user
